mapper.sql: A.NWHOIS_SEQ , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.NLVL_MST_SEQ , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.SWHOISREQUESTID , A.SAPPLICATIONNAME , A.PIP_PREFIX , A.SFIRST_ADDR , A.SLAST_ADDR , A.NFIRST_ADDR , A.NLAST_ADDR , A.NCNT , A.SREQUEST_CD , A.SWHOISRESULT_CD , A.SWHOISRESULT_MSG , A.SKRNICMEMBER_ID , A.SISP_NM , A.SSAID , A.SLLNM , A.SNET_NM , A.SSCRETE_YN , A.SUSERORGGB , A.SNETTYPE , A.SSERVICEGB , A.SSVCLOC , A.SHOSTNOW , A.SUSEDTLNOW , A.SHOST6MONTH , A.SUSEDTL6MONTH , A.SHOST12MONTH , A.SUSEDTL12MONTH , A.SSVCCOMMNET , A.SREMARK , A.DSEND_DT , A.DRECEIPT_DT , A.DRECEIPTOK_DT , A.DREPLY_DT , A.DREGOK_DT , A.SKRNICNO , A.SKRNICORGCODE , A.SOLD_NET , A.SOLD_TOT_SUBNET , A.SOLD_TOT_HOST , A.SOLD_COMMENT , A.SNET_PLAN , A.STOT_SUBNET , A.STOT_HOST , A.SSVCNETWORK , A.SCITY , A.SCCLASSIP , A.SCREATE_ID , A.DCREATE_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SIP_TYPE , B.SNETNAME , B.SORGNAME , B.SADDR , B.SADDR_DETAIL , B.SZIPCODE , B.SEORGNAME , B.SEADDR , B.SEADDR_DETAIL , B.SADM_NAME , B.SADM_ORGNAME , B.SADM_ADDR , B.SADM_ADDR_DETAIL , B.SADM_ZIPCODE , B.SADM_ENAME , B.SADM_EORGNAME , B.SADM_EADDR , B.SADM_EADDR_DETAIL , B.SADM_PHONE , B.SADM_DPPHONE , B.SADM_FAX , B.SADM_EMAIL , B.SFLAG , B.SADDRSEQ , B.SSERIALNO , B.SADM_SERIALNO , B.SECITY , B.SORGTYPE , B.SCUSTNAME

A.NWHOIS_SEQ , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.NLVL_MST_SEQ , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.SWHOISREQUESTID , A.SAPPLICATIONNAME , A.PIP_PREFIX , A.SFIRST_ADDR , A.SLAST_ADDR , A.NFIRST_ADDR , A.NLAST_ADDR , A.NCNT , A.SREQUEST_CD , A.SWHOISRESULT_CD , A.SWHOISRESULT_MSG , A.SKRNICMEMBER_ID , A.SISP_NM , A.SSAID , A.SLLNM , A.SNET_NM , A.SSCRETE_YN , A.SUSERORGGB , A.SNETTYPE , A.SSERVICEGB , A.SSVCLOC , A.SHOSTNOW , A.SUSEDTLNOW , A.SHOST6MONTH , A.SUSEDTL6MONTH , A.SHOST12MONTH , A.SUSEDTL12MONTH , A.SSVCCOMMNET , A.SREMARK , A.DSEND_DT , A.DRECEIPT_DT , A.DRECEIPTOK_DT , A.DREPLY_DT , A.DREGOK_DT , A.SKRNICNO , A.SKRNICORGCODE , A.SOLD_NET , A.SOLD_TOT_SUBNET , A.SOLD_TOT_HOST , A.SOLD_COMMENT , A.SNET_PLAN , A.STOT_SUBNET , A.STOT_HOST , A.SSVCNETWORK , A.SCITY , A.SCCLASSIP , A.SCREATE_ID , A.DCREATE_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SIP_TYPE , A.SNETNAME , A.SORGNAME , A.SADDR , A.SADDR_DETAIL , A.SZIPCODE , A.SEORGNAME , A.SEADDR , A.SEADDR_DETAIL , A.SADM_NAME , A.SADM_ORGNAME , A.SADM_ADDR , A.SADM_ADDR_DETAIL , A.SADM_ZIPCODE , A.SADM_ENAME , A.SADM_EORGNAME , A.SADM_EADDR , A.SADM_EADDR_DETAIL , A.SADM_PHONE , A.SADM_DPPHONE , A.SADM_FAX , A.SADM_EMAIL , A.SFLAG , A.SADDRSEQ , A.SSERIALNO , A.SADM_SERIALNO , A.SECITY , A.SORGTYPE , A.SCUSTNAME
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM BIF.TB_WHOIS A , BIF.TB_WHOIS_USER B
SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM BIF.TB_WHOIS A , BIF.TB_WHOIS_USER B
